chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Suit No. B–20 of 2024 Date Order with Signature of Judge 1. For orders on CMA No.3486/2025. 2. For orders on CMA No.3487/2025. 17.09.2025 Syed Aijaz Hussain Shirazi, Advocate for the plaintiff a/w plaintiff’s attorneys namely Syed Asif Haider son of Syed Razi Haider and Syed Waseem Shafiq son of Syed Shafiq Ahmed. Ms. Maria Ahmed, Advocate for the defendant a/w defendant’s attorneys namely Ummad Ahmed Tanwiri son of Khalid Ahmed Tanwiri and Amad Uddin son of Salah Uddin. ------------------------------------------ 1. Urgency is granted. 2. Through this application, the parties have prayed that the compromise / settlement agreement dated 09.09.2025 filed along with this application be recorded and the present Suit be decreed in terms thereof. The application is supported by the affidavits of authorized representatives / attorneys of the plaintiff-bank and the defendant-company. The above named authorized attorneys / representatives of the plaintiff and the defendant are present in Court. They reiterate the contents of the application and the compromise / settlement agreement filed therewith, and state that they have signed the application and the settlement agreement with their own free will and without any coercion and oppression. They request that the Suit be decreed in terms of the said settlement agreement. Accordingly, the application is allowed as prayed subject to all legal consequences and resultantly the Suit stands decreed in terms of the settlement agreement dated 09.09.2025. Office is directed to prepare the decree. v s s s J U D G E Asif
